headline: Clear calendar and empty comms give you a rare deep-work day — use it to push the 'no ground truth' evals design doc forward.

quick_wins.task: Fix Salesforce and Snowflake credential issues so dashboards are available for next bi-weekly TR
quick_wins.why: Both integrations are failing auth; you're flying blind on escalations and product metrics

must_make_progress.task: Draft or significantly advance the design doc for AE-1079: Generated evaluations — clarify no ground truth
must_make_progress.why: Only active Jira ticket; evals is a key 26.4 deliverable and feeds the Agents Big Rock OKR. No due date means it could slip — own the timeline today.

must_make_progress.task: Review the Agents Big Rock bi-weekly TR page and update any evals-related sections with current status
must_make_progress.why: Next TR is approaching; the page lists evals as a key deliverable and your section should be current

must_communicate_with.about: Align on technical approach for generated evaluations without ground truth — get their input before finalizing design doc
Sync on evals tie-in with DeepRAG/BatchTransform validation patterns and any shared evaluation framework needs

must_report_status.topic: Evals — no ground truth design doc progress
must_report_status.note: Update the Big Rock TR page with design doc status and expected completion date before the next bi-weekly review

agents_in_production.vs_goal: Snowflake auth broken — fix credentials to restore dashboard

evals_adoption.vs_goal: Key 26.4 deliverable; no telemetry available until Snowflake is restored

flags: Salesforce auth is broken (INVALID_LOGIN) — no visibility into customer escalations. Fix urgently or escalate to IT.
Snowflake credentials are empty — product telemetry and MBR dashboard are inaccessible. March data update is pending per TR page.
AE-1079 has no due date set — risk of indefinite drift. Set a target date today.
Autopilot is flagged Yellow/Risk in the Big Rock TR — monitor for spillover impact on evals or agent runtime work.

outcomes.business_impact: No escalations visible and no meetings today — primary business value will come from unblocking the no-ground-truth evals design, which is a prerequisite for the 26.4 evals deliverable that supports the Agents Big Rock.
outcomes.product_adoption: Evals adoption metrics are currently unavailable due to broken Snowflake credentials; restoring access and advancing the no-ground-truth design doc are the two highest-leverage adoption moves today.

slack_summary: Clear calendar today — your single focus should be advancing the AE-1079 design doc (generated evaluations without ground truth), the only active Jira ticket and a key 26.4 Agents deliverable. Second priority: fix Salesforce and Snowflake credentials so you regain visibility into escalations and product telemetry before the next Big Rock TR. Zero meetings today — maximize deep work.
